'''Falung''' was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] of the [[Priest caste]]. A [[Priestess/Legends|Priestess]] of [[Yun-Harla]], she was a part of [[Supreme Commander (Yuuzhan Vong rank)|Supreme Commander]] [[Zho Krazhmir]]'s force which [[First Battle of Zonama Sekot|attacked]] the living world of [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]]. When [[Vergere]] offered to go with the Yuuzhan Vong, she became Falung's [[familiar]]. Falung taught Vergere much of the mythology of Yun-Harla, and Vergere linked herself to the Trickster. Eventually, Falung died, and Vergere passed to the possession of [[Elan]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]'' {{1stm}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{Mo}}
*[[Legacy (2006) 18|''Legacy'' (2006) 18]] {{Mo}}
